name: Tunnel Zone 4 — Steading Root Wandering Monsters
description: Wandering monster table for Zone 4 (Days 15–17): The giants' own territory. Controlled, patrolled, smells of the Steading. Stealth is now the primary tool. Check frequency: once per 8 hours of travel, once per 8 hours of rest.

results.text: 1d4 Hill Giants (standard patrol, torches) [PF2e Lvl 7 each]
1d6+2 Ogres (work crew moving timber or provisions) [PF2e Lvl 3 each]
1 Cave Troll (chained to a post as a guard; chain is 30 feet) [PF2e Lvl 5]
2d6 Dire Wolves (hunting pack, loose from the Wolf Yard above) [PF2e Lvl 3 each]
1 Verbeeg + 2 Ogres (verbeeg gives the orders) [PF2e Lvl 6 / Lvl 3]
2 Hill Giants arguing loudly (DC 24 Stealth to pass unseen) [PF2e Lvl 7 each]
1d6 Cave Bears (giant pets; 60% chance on a chain, 40% loose) [PF2e Lvl 4 each]
2d6 Orc Slaves (fleeing from above; panicked, not hostile; have intel about upper level) [PF2e Lvl –1 each]
1 Hill Giant + 1d4 Dire Wolves on leash (inspection patrol) [PF2e Lvl 7 / Lvl 3]
2d4 Bugbears (giant-allied; acting as outriders and scouts) [PF2e Lvl 3 each]
1 Stone Giant (visiting the Steading for the alliance; curious, not immediately hostile) [PF2e Lvl 9]
3 Ogres + 1 Ogre Spider (spider pulls the supply cart) [PF2e Lvl 3 / Lvl 6]
1 Hill Giant Chief's Guard (elite; doing a perimeter check) [PF2e Lvl 9]
Giant Fire Beetles loose in the tunnel (escaped from storage; no combat, but light draws another roll in 10 minutes) [PF2e Lvl 1 each]
HAZARD — Alarm trip: crude giant-made tripwire of bones and pots; DC 22 Perception to spot; if triggered roll 01–08 on this table immediately
BOSS — The Keeper's Inspection: the Keeper himself (Room 27) walking the tunnel; if combat, gong from Room 26 is struck on his second round
